task:
# Relay stage 3: Diagnose
Task: improve-recent-configurable-models-commit
Working directory: /Users/nicholaswestby/Dev/visual-relay/

## Task input
# Improve Recent Configurable Models Commit

Review the `feat(models): make models configurable` commit (current `HEAD~2`, `bb56580`), tighten the implementation, and remove the dead code it introduced. The visible symptom is the Settings → Live Tiers panel: when `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` is absent, the `claude` tier still renders an enabled, empty ComboBox because its selected model is the placeholder string `"(key missing)"`, which is not in `SelectableModels`.

## Current state (researched)

- `src/VisualRelay.Core/Configuration/BackendConfigGenerator.cs` resolves tiers in `ResolveTiers` and omits `claude` when `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` is absent, but `GetTierRows` adds it back with `Model = "(key missing)"` and `IsEditable = true`:
  ```csharp
  if (tier == "claude" && !aliases.ContainsKey("claude"))
  {
      rows.Add(new TierConfigRow(...)
      {
          SelectableModels = SelectableModels.TryGetValue("claude", out var sm) ? sm : [],
          IsEditable = true,
      });
  }
  ```
- `src/VisualRelay.App/Views/Controls/SettingsPanel.axaml` binds a `ComboBox` to `SelectableModels`/`SelectedModel` inside the `LitTierItems` `DataTemplate`; `IsEditable` only controls `IsEnabled`, so the missing-key `claude` row still draws an empty, enabled dropdown.
- `src/VisualRelay.App/ViewModels/MainWindowViewModel.Keys.cs` copies `IsEditable` from the `TierConfigRow` into `TierModelRow.IsEditable` and skips non-editable rows when persisting overrides.
- The commit added three files that are not referenced anywhere:
  - `src/VisualRelay.App/Views/Controls/StringSplitConverter.cs`
  - `src/VisualRelay.App/Views/Controls/OutputFieldKindEqualsConverter.cs`
  - `src/VisualRelay.Core/Execution/RelayDriver.ConvergenceGuard.cs`
- Existing tests assume every non-`fallback` row is editable:
  - `BackendConfigGeneratorTests.Selectable.GetTierRows_ExposesIsEditableAndSelectableModels`
  - `SettingsPanelUiTests.TierModelOverrides.LiveTiers_HasComboBoxPerEditableTier`

## What to build

1. **Add failing tests first.**
   - In `BackendConfigGeneratorTests.Selectable` (or a new partial), assert that `GetTierRows(presentKeys: ["HF_TOKEN"])` returns a `claude` row with `IsEditable == false` and `KeyPresent == false`.
   - In `SettingsPanelUiTests.TierModelOverrides`, assert that opening Settings with only `HF_TOKEN` yields no visible `ComboBox` for the `claude` row (i.e. the count of `ComboBox`es inside `LitTierItems` equals the count of editable rows, not the total row count).

2. **Update existing assumptions.**
   - Change `GetTierRows_ExposesIsEditableAndSelectableModels` so only tiers whose required key is present are expected to be editable; `fallback` and `claude` (when Anthropic is absent) may be non-editable.
   - Change `LiveTiers_HasComboBoxPerEditableTier` so the non-editable tier assertion accepts both `"fallback"` and `"claude"`.

3. **Fix tier-row editability.**
   - In `BackendConfigGenerator.GetTierRows`, when the `claude` key is missing set `IsEditable = false` (keep the row visible so users still see the tier exists, but it is not configurable until they add the key).

4. **Clean up the Live Tiers UI.**
   - In `SettingsPanel.axaml`, hide the `ComboBox` when `IsEditable` is false and show a muted `TextBlock` displaying `SelectedModel` instead. The `fallback` tier should also render as read-only text rather than a disabled dropdown.

5. **Remove dead code.**
   - Delete `StringSplitConverter.cs`, `OutputFieldKindEqualsConverter.cs`, and `RelayDriver.ConvergenceGuard.cs`.

6. **Run the suite.**
   - Run `./visual-relay test` and `./visual-relay check` and fix any failures.

## Done when

- `./visual-relay check` passes (build, file-size guard ≤300 lines, tests, screenshot render).
- `BackendConfigGenerator.GetTierRows` returns `IsEditable == false` for `claude` when `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` is absent.
- The Settings Live Tiers panel renders non-editable tiers (`fallback`, missing-key `claude`) as read-only text, not as empty or disabled dropdowns.
- The three unused files listed above are gone.
- Commits follow the repo's Conventional Commit rules (`docs/commit-messages.md`) and remain focused; no unrelated files are touched.


## Manifest
(not set yet)

  "options": [
    "Option 1 — Surgical fix: Set `IsEditable = false` in `GetTierRows` for missing-key claude, add conditional TextBlock in the AXAML template, delete dead files, update tests. Smallest diff, one focused commit.",
    "Option 2 — View-model extraction: All of Option 1 plus computed `ShowComboBox`/`ShowReadOnlyText` properties on `TierModelRow` to centralize the visibility logic. Cleaner but larger scope.",
    "Option 3 — Two-commit hybrid: Commit 1 = Option 1 (fix + test + dead-code). Commit 2 = extract view-model polish if warranted. Gets the fix merged fast while leaving the door open for a follow-up."

Bug in `BackendConfigGenerator.GetTierRows` (line 120): missing-key claude row is created with `IsEditable = true` and `Model = \"(key missing)\"` which isn't in `SelectableModels[\"claude\"]`, causing an empty enabled ComboBox. 2. Normal non-fallback editability rule at line 141 sets `IsEditable = tier != FallbackTier` — correct for all except missing-key claude. 3. AXAML template unconditionally renders ComboBox for every row; `IsEditable` only controls `IsEnabled`, not visibility. 4. ViewModel layer already supports `IsEditable` and skips non-editable rows on persist. 5. Three dead-code files with zero references: `StringSplitConverter.cs`, `OutputFieldKindEqualsConverter.cs`, `RelayDriver.ConvergenceGuard.cs`. 6. Two existing tests will break: `GetTierRows_ExposesIsEditableAndSelectableModels` assumes all non-fallback tiers are editable; `LiveTiers_HasComboBoxPerEditableTier` assumes non-editable rows are always `\"fallback\"`. 7. SettingsPanel.axaml is exactly 300 lines — the 300-line guard means any addition must be matched by removal or compression.",

}

result.answer:
I've now read all the relevant source files, tests, and the research-stage findings. Here is the complete diagnosis.

---

## Diagnosis

### Root cause

The `feat(models): make models configurable` commit (`bb56580`) introduced a three-layer defect in how the Live Tiers panel handles the `claude` tier when `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` is absent:

**Layer 1 — `BackendConfigGenerator.GetTierRows` (line 120) sets `IsEditable = true` on the missing-key `claude` row.**

`ResolveTiers` (line 234) correctly omits `claude` from the aliases dictionary when `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` is absent. But `GetTierRows` then walks `Chains.Keys` directly (line 108) and hits a special case at lines 110–123: when it finds `claude` is absent from the resolved aliases, it synthesizes a row with `Model = "(key missing)"` — a placeholder that is **not** in `SelectableModels["claude"]` (which is `["claude-opus-1m", "claude-sonnet"]`, per `BackendConfigGenerator.Selectable.cs` line 33) — and sets `IsEditable = true`. The comment at line 233 reads "Claude is opt-in premium: omit entirely when key is absent," yet the row is *not* omitted from the UI; it's presented as editable.

By contrast, the normal tier path at line 141 sets `IsEditable = tier != FallbackTier` — which would correctly make `fallback` non-editable but leaves the missing-key `claude` bug intact because that path is never reached (the `continue` at line 122 skips it).

**Layer 2 — `SettingsPanel.axaml` (lines 279–284) unconditionally renders a `ComboBox`.**

The `DataTemplate` inside `LitTierItems` always emits a `ComboBox` bound to `SelectableModels`/`SelectedModel`. The `IsEditable` binding only controls `IsEnabled` (line 282), not *visibility*. So when `claude` has `IsEditable = true` (from Layer 1), the panel draws an **enabled, empty** `ComboBox` — because `SelectedModel` = `"(key missing)"` is not one of the `ItemsSource` entries, Avalonia shows nothing selected. When `fallback` comes through with `IsEditable = false`, it renders a **disabled** `ComboBox` — still not read-only text.

**Layer 3 — Tests encode the wrong expectations.**

`GetTierRows_ExposesIsEditableAndSelectableModels` (line 94 of the selectable tests) asserts at line 107–108 that every non-`fallback` row **must** be editable:
```csharp
if (row.Tier == "fallback")
    Assert.False(row.IsEditable, ...);
else
    Assert.True(row.IsEditable, ...);
```
When `presentKeys` is only `{"HF_TOKEN"}`, the `claude` row is non-`fallback`, so the test demands `IsEditable == true` — encoding the bug as expected behavior.

`LiveTiers_HasComboBoxPerEditableTier` (line 17 of the UI tests) asserts at line 49 that any non-editable row's tier **must** be `"fallback"`:
```csharp
else
    Assert.Equal("fallback", row.Tier);
```
This would also fail after fixing Layer 1, because the `claude` row would be non-editable but its tier is not `"fallback"`.

### Dead code confirmed unreferenced

Three files added by the commit have zero references anywhere in the source tree (confirmed via `grep` across `*.cs`, `*.axaml`, `*.csproj`):

| File | Lines | Self-contained? |
|---|---|---|
| `StringSplitConverter.cs` | 22 | Yes — `StringSplitConverter` only in own file |
| `OutputFieldKindEqualsConverter.cs` | 24 | Yes — `OutputFieldKindEqualsConverter` only in own file |
| `RelayDriver.ConvergenceGuard.cs` | 22 | Yes — `IsNonConvergent` and `VerifyAttemptFingerprint` only in own file (the test `RelayDriverVerifyFixTests.ConvergenceGuard.cs` at line 11 explicitly documents the non-convergence early-flag as **removed**) |

### Repro steps

1. Ensure `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` is **not** set in the environment. Set `HF_TOKEN` to any value.
2. Launch the app: `./visual-relay launch`.
3. Open **Settings** → scroll to **Live Tiers**.
4. Observe the `claude` row: an enabled `ComboBox` with no selected value (empty) — because `"(key missing)"` ∉ `SelectableModels["claude"]`.
5. Observe the `fallback` row: a disabled `ComboBox` rather than read-only text.

---

```json
{
  "evidence": "The bug lives in three coordinated locations. (1) BackendConfigGenerator.GetTierRows line 120: the missing-key claude synthetic row is created with `IsEditable = true` and `Model = \"(key missing)\"`. Since `\"(key missing)\"` is not in `SelectableModels[\"claude\"]` (which is `[\"claude-opus-1m\", \"claude-sonnet\"]`), Avalonia renders an empty enabled ComboBox. The normal editability rule at line 141 (`IsEditable = tier != FallbackTier`) is correct for all tiers except this one. (2) SettingsPanel.axaml lines 279-284: the DataTemplate unconditionally renders a ComboBox bound to SelectableModels/SelectedModel with IsEnabled bound to IsEditable — no visibility gating. So non-editable rows (currently just fallback, and after this fix also missing-key claude) show disabled ComboBoxes instead of read-only text. (3) Two existing tests encode wrong expectations: GetTierRows_ExposesIsEditableAndSelectableModels (line 107-108) asserts every non-fallback row IS editable; LiveTiers_HasComboBoxPerEditableTier (line 49) asserts non-editable rows must have Tier == \"fallback\". Both will break when IsEditable is corrected. Three dead-code files added by the commit (StringSplitConverter.cs, OutputFieldKindEqualsConverter.cs, RelayDriver.ConvergenceGuard.cs — 68 lines total) are confirmed unreferenced in any .cs, .axaml, or .csproj file.",
  "excerpts": [
    "BackendConfigGenerator.GetTierRows lines 110-123: `if (tier == \"claude\" && !aliases.ContainsKey(\"claude\")) { rows.Add(new TierConfigRow(Tier: \"claude\", Model: \"(key missing)\", ProviderName: \"Anthropic\", KeyPresent: false, FallbackChainText: null) { SelectableModels = SelectableModels.TryGetValue(\"claude\", out var sm) ? sm : [], IsEditable = true, }); continue; }`",
    "BackendConfigGenerator.GetTierRows line 141: `IsEditable = tier != FallbackTier,` — correct for all tiers except the missing-key claude path above.",
    "SettingsPanel.axaml lines 279-284: `<ComboBox Grid.Column=\"2\" ItemsSource=\"{Binding SelectableModels}\" SelectedItem=\"{Binding SelectedModel, Mode=TwoWay}\" IsEnabled=\"{Binding IsEditable}\" MinWidth=\"160\" FontSize=\"9\"/>` — no visibility gating on IsEditable.",
    "SelectableModels[\"claude\"] = [\"claude-opus-1m\", \"claude-sonnet\"] — does not contain \"(key missing)\".",
    "GetTierRows_ExposesIsEditableAndSelectableModels line 107-108: `if (row.Tier == \"fallback\") Assert.False(row.IsEditable, ...); else Assert.True(row.IsEditable, ...);` — encodes bug as expected behavior.",
    "LiveTiers_HasComboBoxPerEditableTier line 49: `Assert.Equal(\"fallback\", row.Tier);` — will fail when claude becomes non-editable.",
    "RelayDriverVerifyFixTests.ConvergenceGuard.cs line 11: \"The non-convergence early-flag is REMOVED\" — confirms ConvergenceGuard is dead code."
  ],
  "repro": "1. Unset ANTHROPIC_API_KEY; set HF_TOKEN to any value. 2. Run `./visual-relay launch`. 3. Open Settings → scroll to Live Tiers panel. 4. Observe the `claude` row shows an enabled, empty ComboBox (because SelectedModel = \"(key missing)\" is not in the ItemsSource). 5. Observe the `fallback` row shows a disabled ComboBox instead of read-only text. 6. Run `./visual-relay test` — the two existing tests (GetTierRows_ExposesIsEditableAndSelectableModels and LiveTiers_HasComboBoxPerEditableTier) encode the buggy expectations and would fail after fixing IsEditable."
}
```
